Description

Facility configuration and building blocks for field development.

Tie-back analysis package for field development screening.

neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign
 
neqsim.process.ml.examples
Example RL environments demonstrating NeqSim ML integration.
neqsim.process.operations
Operational study helpers that connect P&ID semantics, plant data, automation addresses, and NeqSim process simulations.
neqsim.process.processmodel
 
neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi
DEXPI integration layer for importing and exporting P&ID data.
neqsim.process.processmodel.diagram
Professional Process Flow Diagram (PFD) generation for NeqSim.

    Populates an existing ProcessSystem with units parsed from a DEXPI XML file.

    Populates an existing ProcessSystem with units parsed from a DEXPI XML stream.

    DexpiXmlReader.read(File file, Stream templateStream)
    Reads the provided DEXPI XML file and returns a populated ProcessSystem using a template Stream for generated piping segments.

    DexpiXmlReader.read(InputStream inputStream, Stream templateStream)
    Reads the provided DEXPI XML stream and returns a populated ProcessSystem using a template Stream for any generated piping segments.

    DexpiXmlReader.read(File file, Stream templateStream)

    static ProcessSystem
    DexpiXmlReader.read(InputStream inputStream, Stream templateStream)
    Reads the provided DEXPI XML stream and returns a populated ProcessSystem using a template Stream for any generated piping segments.
    static void
    DexpiXmlWriter.roundTrip(File inputFile, File outputFile, Stream templateStream)
    Performs a bi-directional DEXPI round-trip: reads an existing DEXPI XML P&ID, creates a NeqSim process model from it using the provided fluid template, runs the simulation, and writes the enriched results back to DEXPI XML.
    private static Stream
    DexpiXmlReader.templateOrDefault(Stream templateStream)
